disclaimer: Distances are approximate by road from Korutla. Routes and times vary — check before travel.

inTown.name: Korutla Stepwell (Metla Baavi)
inTown.description: 11th-century stepped tank with early inscriptions; restored by the municipality.

inTown.name: Shree Mahadevaswamy Temple
inTown.description: Ancient temple with Jain Tirthankara heritage; heart of the old town.

inTown.name: Medieval buruju towers
inTown.description: Surviving watchtowers of the historic fortification.

inTown.name: Korutla Railway Station (KRLA)
inTown.description: Peddapalli–Nizamabad line — rail links to Jagtial, Nizamabad, Karimnagar side, and beyond.

nearby.name: Jagtial town & fort
nearby.description: District HQ. Nizam-era star-shaped fort on the pond, busy markets and eateries.

nearby.name: Metpally
nearby.description: Major mandal town north-east of Korutla — markets, buses, and rural hub.

nearby.name: Sri Anjaneya Swamy, Kondagattu
nearby.description: Famous hill temple; heavy pilgrimage traffic — plan early start via Jagtial.

nearby.name: Peddapalli town & rail junction
nearby.description: Rail junction town; connects to Hyderabad, Kazipet, and coal-belt routes.

nearby.name: Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy, Dharmapuri
nearby.description: Godavari-bank temple town; big utsavams in spring and winter.

nearby.name: Sri Raja Rajeshwara Swamy, Vemulawada
nearby.description: One of Telangana’s most visited Shiva kshetras; baths in holy tank, long weekends very crowded.

nearby.name: Kotilingala (Koteswara Swamy)
nearby.description: Ancient Shiva temple on the Godavari belt; combine with Dharmapuri / Ramagundam circuit if time allows.

nearby.name: Karimnagar city
nearby.description: Division HQ — hospitals, malls, Lower Manair Dam bund, and Elgandal fort nearby.

nearby.name: Elgandal Fort, Karimnagar
nearby.description: Hill fort on the Manair; sunset views. Same trip as Karimnagar city.

nearby.name: Lower Manair Dam (LMD) bund
nearby.description: Popular evening walk and reservoir views near Karimnagar.

nearby.name: Ujwala Park, Karimnagar
nearby.description: Family park and boating in Karimnagar — easy add-on with city visit.

nearby.name: Nizamabad
nearby.description: Larger city to the west; Nizamabad fort, railway, and links to Bodhan / Basar.

nearby.name: Sriram Sagar (SRSP) / Pochampad
nearby.description: Major Godavari reservoir; scenic drives and irrigation viewpoints (follow local access rules).

nearby.name: Armoor (Armur)
nearby.description: Nizamabad district town known for chillies and markets; stop en route to Adilabad side.

nearby.name: Ramagundam & Godavari belt
nearby.description: Industrial-coal belt town; Godavari scenery nearby; day trip for those interested in the region.

nearby.name: Bodhan
nearby.description: Historic town in Nizamabad district; sugar belt and old-town lanes.

nearby.name: Mancherial
nearby.description: Mancherial district HQ on the Hyderabad–Nagpur corridor; coal belt and Godavari-side trips.

nearby.name: Nirmal town & forts
nearby.description: Famous for Nirmal toys and paintings; old fort sites and Adilabad-side waterfalls as longer loops.

nearby.name: Medak Cathedral & Medak Fort
nearby.description: One of Asia’s largest church buildings; hill fort nearby — full day from Korutla.

nearby.name: Basar — Gnana Saraswathi Temple
nearby.description: Major Saraswathi pilgrimage on Godavari; often paired with Nizamabad / Bodhan.

nearby.name: Kaleshwaram (Kaleswara Mukteswara)
nearby.description: Sacred tri-shrine at Godavari; part of larger pilgrimage circuit (long day or overnight).

nearby.name: Kuntala waterfall
nearby.description: Monsoon-famous falls in Adilabad district; slippery paths — visit in season with care.

nearby.name: Pochera waterfall
nearby.description: Another Adilabad-region fall; combine planning with Kuntala / Nirmal circuit.

nearby.name: Warangal / Hanamkonda (Thousand Pillar, Ramappa)
nearby.description: Kakatiya heritage — Thousand Pillar Temple, fort remnants; Ramappa UNESCO site needs separate leg south-east.

nearby.name: Hyderabad
nearby.description: State capital — Charminar, museums, airport, and high-speed rail from Kazipet / Secunderabad side.
